eventList.description: List of events to listen. Available values: record.create.before, record.create.after, record.update.before, record.update.after, record.delete.before, record.delete.after, record.rownumber.update.before, record.rownumber.update.after, record.comment.create.after, record.comment.delete.after, app.member.add.after, app.member.remove.after, app.member.role.update.after, app.postevent, app.publish, app.systemboot, app.schedule.before, app.schedule.success, app.schedule.fail, app.automatic.before, app.automatic.success, app.automatic.fail, app.role.create.before, app.role.create.after, app.role.update.before, app.role.update.after, app.role.delete.before, app.role.delete.after, app.role.permission.update.before, app.role.permission.update.after

invokeType.description: Invocation type. Must be one of: automatic (invoke automation), script (invoke script).

tableEventSetting.description: Data table event settings (configure when listening to data table record related events)

tableList.description: List of data table IDs to listen (empty means listen to all tables)

tableSourceList.description: Data source filter. Available values: form (form submission), survey (survey submission), bpmn (workflow submission)

postEventSetting.description: Post event settings (configure when listening to app.postevent)

postEventId.description: Post event ID (empty means listen to all events)

postEventAppDefineId.description: Application define ID of the post event (cannot be empty)

automaticEventSetting.description: Automation event settings (configure when listening to app.automatic.* events)

automaticList.description: List of automation IDs to listen

scheduleEventSetting.description: Scheduled task event settings (configure when listening to app.schedule.* events)

scheduleList.description: List of scheduled task IDs to listen

bpmnEventSetting.description: Workflow event settings (configure when listening to workflow related events)

workflowList.description: List of workflow IDs to listen
